instructions: Stack one block on top of the other.
Pick up a cube and place it on top of the second cube.
Stack the two blocks so one is on top of the other.
Grab one of the cubes and set it on the other one.
Place one block on the other to form a tower of two.
Use your grippers to stack the cubes on top of each other.
Pick up a block and carefully balance it on the other block.
Take one cube and place it directly on top of the second cube.
Build a two-block tower by stacking the cubes.
Lift one cube and set it on the other so they are stacked.
